title: NiFi Hub Flow CI Test Configuration
description: Defines the ephemeral runtime configuration for testing a flow in CI. The runtime is created before tests and destroyed after.

github_environment.description: GitHub Environment that holds secrets (SNOWFLAKE_PAT, NIFI_RUNTIME_PAT, etc.) for the target Snowflake account.

deployment.description: Existing Openflow deployment name to create the ephemeral runtime in.

database.description: Database where the ephemeral runtime is scoped.

schema.description: Schema where the ephemeral runtime is scoped.

execute_as_role.description: Role that the runtime uses for Snowflake data access.

sensitive_param_pattern.description: Regex pattern to classify parameters from the auto-provisioned Snowflake Parameter Provider as sensitive. Defaults to '.*' (all sensitive).

provided_parameter_contexts.description: Regex pattern to filter which parameter contexts from providers are added as inherited. Only contexts with names matching this pattern are added. If not specified, no provider contexts are inherited.

nars.description: NAR files to download and upload to the runtime before deploying the flow. URLs starting with ${GITHUB_RELEASES}/ are resolved to the current repo's releases at runtime. Full URLs (https://...) are used as-is.

flow.description: Post-deployment configuration for the flow under test. Parameters and assets are applied after the flow JSON is uploaded.

parameters.description: Parameter values to set on the flow's parameter context(s) after upload.

assets.description: Files to download and bind to parameter context assets.
